content:wysiwyg_basic:2:45.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:2:45.html:
"If we are to better the future, we must disturb the present."

These words from The Salvation Army's cofounder Catherine Booth inspire us daily to work to make our community a better place. The "Better the Future" campaign aims to raise nearly $32 million to support our most impactful programs and facilities, removing barriers to success and strengthening families and our community at large.

content:textarea:10:38.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:10:38.html: *The total campaign also includes resources for an operating endowment for these new facilities and programs. Nearly $21 million Has already been committed to the campaign.

content:textarea:13:2.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:13:2.html: With your prayer, financial support and advocacy, we can "better the future" for countless individuals and families in our community. Together, we can make our community all that it aspires to be.
